_doc: Append-only, PII-safe outcomes ledger for the 3dpa printer-intake pipeline (S4). One JSON object per processed candidate, appended by the Printer Addition Assistant after each candidate reaches a terminal resolution. The Intake Retrospective reads this as its durable supervision signal (raw Scout run reports are overwritten + gitignored, so they are not a history source). Any line carrying a _schema key is a marker and is skipped by the reader.

fields.candidateKey: the Scout request.key (string), or the full requestKeys[] (array) for a collapsed multi-request candidate
fields.runId: the report source.watermarkOut, else the run-report mtime / run wall-clock when absent (fixtures / --no-watermark runs)
fields.scoutOutcome: the Scout outcome for this candidate: needs-research | duplicate | declined-non-fdm | incomplete | unactionable | parse-error
fields.ownerResolution: shipped | declined-correct | was-duplicate-missed | was-brand-typo | was-suffix-variant | was-noise | was-mis-declined
fields.correctiveSignal: the guardrail that would have prevented a Scout miss, e.g. brandAliases:sparkx->creality | modelSuffixStrip:w/cfs | resinKeywords:-mars | none

privacy: keys/hashes only — never raw requester notes or email addresses
